heading: Eligible grant recipients
label: 1804 Eligible grant recipients
notes: Amendments2008—Par. (4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 110–3151998— substituted “college or university” for “community college” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 105–244

amendments: Amendments2008—Par. (4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 110–3151998— substituted “college or university” for “community college” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 105–244

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under , Education.Pub. L. 105–244Pub. L. 105–244section 3 of Pub. L. 105–244section 1001 of Title 20Oct. 1, 1998

children.text: is governed by a board of directors or board of trustees a majority of which are Indians;
demonstrates adherence to stated goals, a philosophy, or a plan of operation which is directed to meet the needs of Indians;
if in operation for more than one year, has students a majority of whom are Indians; and

children.label: A
children.text: is accredited by a nationally recognized accrediting agency or association determined by the Secretary of Education to be a reliable authority with regard to the quality of training offered; or

children.label: B
children.text: according to such an agency or association, is making reasonable progress toward accreditation.
